notes:
### v1.1.12

#### Added
- Party Plan was added as a restricted testing feature below Progression Planner.
- Party Plan groups can be created, joined, saved locally, reopened, deleted by the owner, or left by members.
- Discord whitelist friend search, member colors, compact character configuration, planned raid selection, and raid-board assignments were added.
- Static run connections can link eligible characters from different members/rosters inside a raid lane.
- Google Sheets / Apps Script sync was added for groups, members, characters, planned raids, assignments, completion snapshots, encounter snapshots, and planned raid config snapshots.
- Party Plan now shares current-week completion_status data, encounters.db player snapshots, and conf_raid planned difficulties including mixed gate setups.

#### Improved
- Party Plan UI was tightened and restyled to match the app's dashboard/settings controls.
- Member colors now carry through runner labels and assigned raid-board character labels.
- Configuration and raid-board tabs can scroll horizontally when group planning needs more space.
- Party Plan feedback now uses bottom-right toast messages that disappear automatically.
- Raid-board left-click/right-click instructions now sit in the header with mouse icons, while character tooltips focus on owner and raid status.
- Background sheet sync now only posts snapshot changes when local completion state changes.

#### Changed
- Party Plan access is temporarily restricted to selected Discord IDs for testing.
- The Party Plan Apps Script endpoint now comes from the private PARTY_PLAN_ENDPOINT_URL build/runtime configuration instead of public frontend code.
- The docs folder is now ignored by git because it is only used for development/setup reference.

#### Fixed
- Deleting a Party Plan group removes that group's rows from all sheet-backed Party Plan tables.
- Leaving a shared Party Plan group removes that member's rows, characters, raid config snapshots, completion snapshots, and encounter snapshots.
- Unreliable drag-and-drop assignment was replaced with click-to-select and Assign selected here.
- Friend remove controls no longer push member color fields out of alignment.
